c.d: The range of live streaming content available on the platform, including genres like sports, entertainment, gaming, and more.
The ease of navigation and overall user experience provided by the app.
The range of devices (e.g., smartphones, tablets, smart TVs) on which the app is available.
The pricing model of the app, including free access, subscription fees, or pay-per-view options.
The opportunities available for content creators to earn revenue through the platform.
